name: Cranberry Chipotle Compote
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and dice the pears and apples (medium).
2. Heat oil on medium-high until hot.
3. Add pears, apples, and raisins to the pan. Cook 3-5 minutes, or until soft.
4. Pour in 1/4 cup Grand Marnier and deglaze the pan by swirling the liquid around.
5. Add cranberries, chipotle peppers, cinnamon, sugar, orange zest, and orange juice. Stir well.
6. Simmer for 40-45 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it begins to thicken.
7. Add nutmeg and another 1/4 cup Grand Marnier. Mix thoroughly.
8. Allow the compote to cool completely before refrigerating. It will be ready to serve when chilled. Makes about 1 quart.
